narrative:
Lee Twp township has 643 registered voters, with 60.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
